primary_text:
You care about where your food comes from. So do 2,000+ other Sydney families.

They get regenerative beef, heritage pork, wild-caught salmon and pasture-raised chicken delivered from 50+ farms. No warehouses. No wholesalers. Straight from the paddock to your door in 2-3 days.

FarmThru is now opening investment to the community via Birchal. From $50.

Join the waitlist. $5 refundable deposit secures VIP access.

Not financial advice.
headline: 2,000+ Families Know Their Farmer
description: Regenerative food from 50+ farms, delivered in days. Sydney, Central Coast, Wollongong.
creative_brief: Direct address validates the reader's existing values, then shows them a community that shares those values. Product range specificity (beef, pork, salmon, chicken) makes it tangible. Belonging + investment CTA combined.
